data.description: Totalkredit A/S refinances floating rate loans, a move aimed at reducing interest costs for borrowers.

data.title: Frontline plc to release Q2 2025 results on Aug 29. Webcast and call at 3:00 p.m. CET, available at www.frontlineplc.cy.
data.description: Frontline plc. is set to announce its preliminary second quarter 2025 results on Friday, August 29, 2025. A webcast and conference call are scheduled to take place at 3:00 p.m. CET (9:00 a.m. U.S. Eastern Time) on that day. Those interested can download the results presentation beforehand from the Investor Relations section on www.frontlineplc.cy.

data.title: Dutch Bros reintroduces fall flavors: Caramel Pumpkin Brûlée, Cookie Butter Latte, and new Candied Cherry Rebel.
data.description: In TEMPE, Arizona on August 22, 2025, Dutch Bros announces the comeback of the popular Caramel Pumpkin Brûlée and Cookie Butter Latte drinks for fall. They are also introducing a new flavor, the Candied Cherry Rebel, to join the lineup. The fall offerings aim to channel a cozy flannel vibe, bringing seasonal favorites back to the menu.

data.title: WM declares $0.825 quarterly cash dividend per share, payable on Sep 26, 2025, to stockholders of record on Sep 12, 2025.
data.description: Houston-based WM (NYSE: WM) has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.825 per share, to be paid on September 26, 2025, to stockholders of record as of September 12, 2025. WM, formerly Waste Management, is a top provider of environmental solutions in North America, with a commitment to prioritizing people and operating with integrity. The company, headquartered in Texas, focuses on sustainability through its subsidiaries.

data.title: Sonic Healthcare USA acquires Cairo Diagnostics to expand hematology oncology testing capabilities.
data.description: In White Plains, New York and Dallas on August 22, 2025, Sonic Healthcare USA, Inc. (SHUSA or Sonic) revealed the acquisition of a major portion of the assets of Cairo Diagnostics, LLC, Cairo Diagnostics NJ, LLC, and Rye Management and Logistics Corp. This strategic move marks a significant development in the healthcare industry, signaling a shift in operational resources and expansion.

data.title: zvoove acquires Spain's market leader in temporary staffing solutions, Nivel IV, on Aug. 22, 2025.
data.description: On August 22, 2025, in Munich and Vigo, Spain, zvoove, a prominent software and AI solution provider for temporary staffing, private security, and cleaning sectors in Europe, revealed the acquisition of Nivel IV. This strategic move solidifies zvoove's position as a top player in the industry and enhances its presence in Spain. Nivel IV, known as the primary software provider in Spain's X sector, brings a wealth of expertise and resources to the table. This acquisition marks a significant milestone for zvoove and underscores its commitment to growth and innovation in the market.

data.title: Lighthouse Pharma gets $49.2M from NIA to study LHP588 for Alzheimer's Disease; Trial to enroll 300 patients.
data.description: A groundbreaking clinical trial is set to enroll 300 patients in a double-blind, placebo-controlled study of a Lysine-Gingipain Inhibitor in San Francisco. Lighthouse Pharmaceuticals, a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, is leading the trial. The study aims to evaluate the effectiveness of the inhibitor in treating a specific condition. This marks an important step in the development of precision therapies and could potentially benefit a significant number of patients. The trial is expected to begin on August 22, 2025, with results anticipated to provide valuable insights into the inhibitor's potential impact.

data.title: Kyle Johnson has been appointed to lead the national HVAC sales division at IAC Acoustics, a manufacturer of noise control products.
data.description: In Naperville, Illinois, on August 22, 2025, IAC Acoustics, a division of Catalyst Acoustics Group, which specializes in producing metal noise control products for industries such as industrial, commercial, architectural, and construction, has announced the appointment of a new member.

data.title: Grounded Lithium Corp. (TSXV: GRD) (OTCQB: GRDAF) reports Q2 2025 financial results, with corporate updates and stock options.
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta on August 22, 2025, Grounded Lithium Corp. (GLC) has released its financial and operational results for the three and six month periods concluding on June 30, 2025. The company is listed on the TSXV as GRD and on the OTCQB as GRDAF. Important figures include undisclosed values for revenue, net income, and production metrics.

data.title: Top Win International (Nasdaq: SORA) now AsiaStrategy, accepts Bitcoin for luxury watches. Name change effective at Nasdaq.Character Count: 105
data.description: On August 22, 2025, it was announced that Top Win International Limited, trading on Nasdaq under the symbol SORA, has officially rebranded to AsiaStrategy. This change signifies a pivotal moment in the company's evolution, with a fresh corporate name and a new ticker symbol on Nasdaq. The unveiling of a new company logo is imminent, setting the tone for the future trajectory of AsiaStrategy.
Kazakhstan's oil conveyed through the Druzhba pipeline continues without any restrictions, according to RIA.

data.title: NexLiving reported record Q2 2025 results: NOI increased by 75% to $5.2 million, FFO per share by 26%, with 2,083 suites in June 30 (up 100% from a year ago). Occupancy hit 97% post-quarter end, and same property NOI increased by 3.4%. Stock ticker: TSXV:NXLV. CEO Stavro Stathonikos positive about growth and operational excellence. Reach lasted value for shareholders. No change in net debt to GBV ratio, but 5.6% increase in net asset value. Further details on Benzinga.com.
data.description: NexLiving Communities Inc. reported strong financial and operational results for Q2 2025. The company's suite count increased to 2,083, up 100% from a year ago and 4% from December 31, 2024. Net operating income (NOI) rose by 75% to $5.2 million for the quarter and by 72% for the six-month period ending June 30, 2025. Funds from operations (FFO) per share increased by 26% for the quarter and 15% for the six-month period. Same property NOI increased by 3.4% due to a 3.7% rise in revenue and a 4.2% increase in expenses. The occupancy rate was at 95.9%, with an increase to 97% post-quarter end. Net asset value grew to $143,816,584 with a per-share value of $4.36. NexLiving's President stated that the company is well-positioned for growth and value creation for shareholders with a solid acquisition pipeline and increasing free cash flow.
